title: helichrysum longinquum
intro: Helichrysum longinquum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum longinquum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to address various health conditions.
